programs.title: Truck Turner
programs.desc: The great Isaac Hayes stars in this powerful, pull-out-the-stops crime thriller that pulsates with high-octane energy and nonstop suspense as Truck Turner tracks a sadistic pimp through the mean streets of Los Angeles. Nichelle Nichols also stars.

programs.title: Black Caesar
programs.desc: The brutal assault at the hands of a racist cop will inform the life of Tommy Gibbs (Fred Williamson, "Hammer"), who will grow up to become the reigning head of Harlem�s black mafia in "Black Caesar."

programs.title: Gang Related
programs.desc: Two killers are hiding where no one will ever find them...behind their badges! Tupac Shakur and James Belushi are two corrupt police detectives caught in a dangerous web of deceit in this gritty, smart and tough action thriller.

programs.title: The Mighty Quinn
programs.desc: When police officer Xavier Quinn (Denzel Washington) learns that his childhood friend has become the prime suspect in a murder case, he also discovers that he's the only one who feels that his friend was framed to protect the local tourism business.

programs.title: Out Of Time
programs.desc: Denzel Washington is caught in a web of intrigue as he investigates the murder of a woman he was seeing...and all the evidence points to him.

programs.title: Colors
programs.desc: As members of the Los Angeles Police Department's elite anti-gang unit, a seasoned cop (Robert Duvall) and his new partner (Sean Penn) are called in to assist with the crackdown against the mounting gang violence in the slums of East Los Angeles.
